name: House of Horrors: Kidnapped
overview: HOUSE OF HORRORS: KIDNAPPED tells the gripping stories of people who were kidnapped and lived to tell. Each episode reveals one survivor’s terrifying experience from the moment of abduction to the hours, days, or months of captivity to the escape and recovery, as told through their eyes.

trailers.title: Routine Headcount Turns Into One Of The Largest Prison Riots
